title: ERROR: Assert `chunk.width >= 0' failed in kernel/rtlil.cc:3264.
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

On current HEAD of yosys (commit 8b92ddb9), running `yosys -S bug.v` causes an assertion failure:

```
$ ../deps/yosys/yosys -S bug.v
[...]
 Yosys 0.7+612 (git sha1 8b92ddb9, clang 6.0.0 -fPIC -Os)


-- Parsing `bug.v' using frontend `verilog' --

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend.
Parsing Verilog input from `bug.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\bug'.
ERROR: Assert `chunk.width >= 0' failed in kernel/rtlil.cc:3264.
```

Here is a minimized small bug.v:

```
module bug(input [0:3] x, input [0:32] y, output [0:2] out);
    assign out = y[x:x+2];
endmodule
```
code_blocks:
$ ../deps/yosys/yosys -S bug.v
[...]
 Yosys 0.7+612 (git sha1 8b92ddb9, clang 6.0.0 -fPIC -Os)


-- Parsing `bug.v' using frontend `verilog' --

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend.
Parsing Verilog input from `bug.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\bug'.
ERROR: Assert `chunk.width >= 0' failed in kernel/rtlil.cc:3264.
